today_in_history_posts.title: RFC: Deterministic Entropy From BIP32 Keychains
today_in_history_posts.summary:
- The proposed BIP aims to streamline seed and backup management across wallet implementations.
- It introduces a method for deriving initial entropy from HD keychain paths using HMAC-SHA512.
- The proposal includes test cases and is dual-licensed under the Open Publication License and BSD 2-clause license.

today_in_history_posts.title: Difference between ignoring htlc request due to wrong payment hash vs refusing to release preimage in LND
today_in_history_posts.summary:
- Subhra Mazumdar experimented with LND, establishing a channel between two parties, A and B.
- An error occurred when Subhra tried sending a payment to B, using a unique payment hash.
- Subhra queried about simulating a griefing attack in LND, where B withholds the correct preimage.

today_in_history_posts.title: Deflationary money is a Good Thing
today_in_history_posts.summary:
- Passive investment strategies include buying assets without active management, like land or gold.
- Active investment requires engagement, such as developing real estate or influencing company operations.
- The article suggests central banks could stabilize the economy using a currency backed by Bitcoin.
